title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek V4 is analyzed as a flagship model that reduces inference cost and compute demand significantly. The video discusses how V4 represents a leap in LLM efficiency and reflects different incentive structures between open and closed AI labs competing in the global AI race.
